name: World Tour - Flying on Real 3D Maps

reviews.review_description: Not showing scenery  on quest 2,great idea though

reviews.review_title: Good Idea, but not working on Quest2
reviews.review_description: This is a really great idea. We are however waiting that this would be working for Quest2, as indicated in the description. 3.9CHF is not expensive, but still too much for a non working program . I will wait and see.. I trust this will be corrected.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback, You will see the betterments in upcoming updates. Stay Tuned!

reviews.review_description:
The good: I like the collection of famous landmarks.
The bad: 
1. I don't see any information about the landmarks as stated in the APP description.
2. The visuals are of low quality.
Suggestions:
1. The helicopter is uncomfortable to fly in, because it causes motion sickness, and also too noisy.
2. I hope we can just use the joystick to control the flight of the magic blanket and the hot balloon.
3. Smooth turn can cause motion sickness. Adding an option to use snap turn would be better.
4. Adding some music during the game would be nice.
